comment: Hand-labeled ground truth for the eval-only documents. sourceClause strings are verbatim substrings of the doc text. Tricky cases on purpose: Paragraph 1 of eval-a carries TWO duties; the Acknowledgment and Recitals create none.

labels.sourceClause: The General Partner shall notify Meridian Bay Insurance Company in writing no fewer than twelve (12) Business Days prior to the closing of any Portfolio Investment in the gaming sector
shall deliver a written risk memorandum describing such investment no later than thirty (30) days after such closing
The General Partner shall not amend the Fund's valuation policy in a manner adverse to Meridian Bay Insurance Company without the prior written consent of Meridian Bay Insurance Company
The General Partner shall deliver to Meridian Bay Insurance Company a statement of Solvency II look-through data within forty (40) days after the end of each fiscal quarter

Meridian Bay Insurance Company shall be excused from participation in any Portfolio Investment in tobacco or gambling enterprises to the extent such participation would violate its written investment policy
Each drawdown notice shall be delivered to the Limited Partners no fewer than ten (10) Business Days prior to the due date for the related capital contribution
Upon the death or disability of any Principal, the General Partner shall give written notice to the Limited Partners within five (5) Business Days of becoming aware of such event
The General Partner shall not cause the Partnership to invest more than 25% of aggregate Commitments in any single Portfolio Company without the prior written consent of the Advisory Committee
The General Partner shall furnish unaudited financial statements to each Limited Partner within sixty (60) days after the end of each of the first three fiscal quarters
The General Partner shall publish an annual sustainability report and deliver it to the Limited Partners within ninety (90) days after each fiscal year end
No Limited Partner may pledge its interest in the Partnership without the prior written consent of the General Partner
